Peter--

**Donald Trump is trying to stop Robert Mueller from testifying before Congress.**

It's imperative that the American people hear from Special Counsel Robert Mueller -- but President Trump is doing everything in his power to prevent this.

We can't let Trump get away with silencing Mueller and allowing Attorney General Barr to be the final word on this. [Peter, if you agree, sign your name to speak up and demand that Congress be able to hear from Robert Mueller:](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b52/1cd0ac28/330be6fd/356bfbe8/3950905801/VEsE/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Mueller-Hearing?source=email-bsd-20190506mueller-b3_PET_AC_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190506mueller&utm_content=b3_PET_AC_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1") | | [**SIGN MY NAME >>**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b52/1cd0ac28/330be6fd/356bfbe8/3950905801/VEsF/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Mueller-Hearing?source=email-bsd-20190506mueller-b3_PET_AC_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190506mueller&utm_content=b3_PET_AC_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")

body:

Friend,

This is Katie, one of Congressman Steve Chabot’s campaign advisors.

Steve and I just finishing going over his strategic plans for the 2020 reelection campaign – and I wanted to run a few of them by you:

Get the truth out about the far-left’s disastrous and socialist Green New Deal agenda – so that Steve can continue to fight back most effectively for your freedoms.Expose Democrats’ push towards legalized infanticide, which they are trying to spread all over Ohio and all over our nation – so that Steve can continue to protect the unborn in Congress.Show voters the tax savings they are seeing every day due to our Republican tax cuts – so that Steve can continue his record of voting to cut your taxes.

However, to get our campaign messages out most effectively, it’s going to require us to raise enough funds to support television ads, radio spots, our door to door campaign, and the purchase of thousands of yard signs which will be seen in Cincinnati, all the way to Springboro.

We’re projecting it’s going to take MILLIONS of dollars to do all of that. So, we have to start raising funds now to ensure we reach our goals. [https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/stevechabot/donation1/?InitiativeKey=LDIJUAD2FVUN]

Will you pitch in today and support our efforts, so that we’ll be ready to get out our campaign messages? [https://secure.campaignsolutions.com/stevechabot/donation1/?InitiativeKey=LDIJUAD2FVUN]

name: Jason Yates
subject: What you MUST know about the Equality Act
body:
| | Peter, Equality. It is a word that has helped spark movements and revolutionary change around the globe. It is a powerful word representing opportunity, fairness, and equal rights for every person under the law. The fight for equality helped free African Americans from the bonds of slavery and segregation to finally allow them to enjoy their God-given human rights and opportunities. The movement calling for women’s equality helped women gain the right to vote, brought discrimination into the light, and lifted women out of poverty and oppression across the world. Now we hear the powerful word equality being discussed again, in Washington D.C., local communities, places of business, television shows, and through social media. **This time, however, the word “equality” is being used to describe everything but true equality...** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvPMrQr3kq8Urxo9EeW_LXVVEA524YQ8bn1_w7ByPRImBiP_m7D6Rh-FrPVeDzzRZ_Q&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190507com01&n=1) I encourage you to [read more about the Equality Act](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvPMrQr3kq8Urxo9EeW_LXVVEA524YQ8bn1_w7ByPRImBiP_m7D6Rh-FrPVeDzzRZ_Q&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190507com01&n=2) to better understand exactly how this legislation will shape America if it passes. We will continue to keep you updated on this issue and provide you with an opportunity to contact your legislators before the vote. Please be in prayer that this policy would not pass. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190507com01&n=3)

| Dan Feltes’ efforts to create an income tax are just the latest example of New Hampshire Democrats turning to the far-left policies coming straight out of Washington. While Governor Sununu is offering superior leadership and superior plans to address New Hampshire's most-pressing problems, Senate Democrats, led by Dan Feltes, are pushing higher taxes, increased fees, and bigger government. subject: Introducing Camp Kamala
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
Howdy! I’m reaching out to share some really important news: we’re opening up enrollment for an awesome program called Camp Kamala, and I want you to sign up to join us. It’s sort of like summer camp, but better: Camp Kamala will be all about how we elect Kamala the next President of the United States. **[If you’re already on board, click here to sign up today and follow instructions to join our online community and register for the first training!](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-org-190506-camp-kamala?refcode=ema190507-full&source=ema190507-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1&akid=4661%2E5755789%2EP7dydB)** Camp Kamala will empower supporters to join our movement, no matter where you live. Our eight-week online program will teach you the ins and outs of volunteering for our campaign, including a crash course in the cutting-edge tools we’re using to spread our message and get Kamala elected. Then, you’ll be all trained as a volunteer leader for Kamala in your community. Don’t know how much time you can commit yet? No worries. After the first few sessions, you’ll be able to pick one of two “tracks” of the program: Camp Kamala and Camp Kamala+. **Camp Kamala**
* Campers will attend one online training session per week, followed by a quiz at the end of each training session

* After Camp is over, you’ll be fully trained and empowered to lead community and volunteer events in your community for Kamala

**Camp Kamala+**
* An accelerated track that provides additional opportunities for volunteer leadership, including the ability to train other volunteers

* Campers will attend additional online training sessions per week and complete one homework assignment per week

**[Sign up to join Camp Kamala today and start your training to become a volunteer leader in your community!](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-org-190506-camp-kamala?refcode=ema190507-full&source=ema190507-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=2&akid=4661%2E5755789%2EP7dydB)** Talk more soon, — Jose Jose Nunez
Digital Organizing Director
Kamala 2020

Dear Friend –
Governor Kemp just enacted HB 481 – a 6-week abortion ban – which makes abortions illegal before most women even know that they are pregnant. It threatens women with life imprisonment and possibly the death penalty if they have an abortion in the state of Georgia. Republican leaders don’t trust women to make our own personal healthcare decisions. Therefore, we shouldn’t trust them with leadership positions.
Georgia's Senator must uphold a woman's right to choose, but David Perdue is advancing the same anti-abortion extremist policies in the Senate that have banned Georgia women from exercising their constitutional right after just 6 weeks. Stand with me against these draconian policies today. [https://teresatomlinson.com/stop-the-abortion-bans/]
https://teresatomlinson.com/stop-the-abortion-bans/ [https://teresatomlinson.com/stop-the-abortion-bans/]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://teresatomlinson.com/stop-the-abortion-bans/]
With this bill, the GOP has declared pregnant women to be vessels of the state, and decreed that the men who control the Georgia state legislature and the governor’s office have a compelling “state interest” in our wombs and these most personal decisions. We now know, without any doubt, that all their talk of ‘small government’ and ‘personal freedom’ only applies to them, not us.
The GOP has been at war with women’s rights on every possible front – through similar legislation in 15 other states; at the federal level with legislation introduced by Senator Graham and cosponsored by Senator Perdue; and in the U.S. Supreme Court, which is currently being stacked with avowed anti-abortion activist justices.
I call on women across the country to recognize this war for what it is – an attack on women’s health, safety, and equality. Join with me and aligned efforts everywhere to fight these draconian measures and defeat the politicians behind them.
It's time to put people in leadership who trust women to make their own healthcare decisions. That's why I'm running for Senate – stand with me today [https://teresatomlinson.com/stop-the-abortion-bans/]
This bill would set our society back 50 years – we have to fight back.
Thank you,
Teresa

subject: ‘Medicare for All’ Means Choice for None
body:
“‘Medicare for all’ is another name for socialized health insurance,” the Washington Examiner editorial board writes. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=efbc35eac7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **‘Medicare for All’ Means Choice for None**

“‘Medicare for all’ is another name for socialized health insurance,” the _Washington Examiner_ editorial board writes.

“Follow the defenses of ‘Medicare for all’ closely enough, through their twists and turns, and eventually you end up in a dead-end alley from which there is no escape. Democrats’ plans to supposedly open up Medicare to everybody always end up in the same place: They absolutely must bar people from choosing to buy their own insurance instead . . . This means they would also strip millions of Americans of their current healthcare plans.”

Democrats “want to run not only health insurance but the entire healthcare sector.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6391802890&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump honored Tiger Woods for his momentous golf career by awarding him the Presidential Medal of Freedom, the nation's highest civilian honor, at the White House on Monday,” [CBS News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4654e85696&e=3ee4985eea) reports. “The age of Tiger gave us moments that will live forever in sporting lore,” the President said, standing alongside the golf legend.
---
|
---
| Paid family leave has stalled in Congress for years, but thanks to Republicans, that could all be changing soon, Abby Vesoulis writes in _[TIME](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ed8ca778e&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Republican Sens. Marco Rubio, Joni Ernst, Mike Lee and Bill Cassidy have all announced paid parental-leave proposals in the last two years. Ivanka Trump, the President’s daughter and senior adviser, has also made it one of her chief priorities while serving in the White House.” Ms. Trump says that “bipartisan proposals are taking shape to support America’s working families.”
---
|
---
| “For suggesting that an impartial investigation might be in order, Speaker of the House Nancy Pelosi said Mr. Barr was ‘going off the rails,’” _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=43d2366ccd&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. “I think spying on a political campaign is a big deal,” Mr. Barr said. “I feel I have an obligation to make sure that government power is not abused. I think that is one of the principal roles of the attorney general.”
---
|
---
| “Poor Jerry Nadler. The congressman from New York has been itching to get Donald Trump almost from the day he was elected president,” William McGurn writes in _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e2bebfa088&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Alas, just as Mr. Nadler finds himself in a position to do it—as House Judiciary Committee chairman he has jurisdiction over impeachment proceedings—special counsel Robert Mueller dropped a report that found zero evidence of collusion with Russia. With no crime to cover up, what would the president have been obstructing?”

---
|

| | Peter --

There's no way around it: Our health care system just isn't working for everyday Americans. Far too many are paying sky-high insurance premiums and inflated prescription drug prices that they can't afford. In the 7th District, many Virginians worry that one unexpected illness or life-saving surgery could put their family's financial future at risk.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I will only nominate judges who will uphold Roe v. Wade and protect reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
body:
A woman's right to make her own personal health decisions is non-negotiable.
| | |
---
Peter,
250 bills restricting abortion. 41 states. In just three months.
That's what the onslaught of Republican anti-abortion state legislation looked like this year.
As a candidate, Donald Trump said he would punish women for accessing abortion, and as president, he's made good on that promise by stacking the Supreme Court with anti-choice extremists Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch. Republicans nationwide push these bills because they _want_ a court ruling that guts abortion access nationwide, forever.
_We simply cannot let that happen._ The decision about if and when to start a family should be made by a woman and her doctor--not Republican legislators, not Brett Kavanaugh and certainly not Donald Trump.
**I'm proud to announce today that as president, I will only nominate judges --including Supreme Court justices--who will commit to upholding _Roe v. Wade_****as settled law and to protect women's reproductive rights.** Women in America must be trusted to make their own medical decisions and have access to the full range of reproductive health care, including abortion.
**[Join the team fighting for reproductive freedom. Sign on and support my pledge to only nominate judges and Supreme Court justices who will protect reproductive rights:](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9771ad/2ae112ef/6fe0ee01/357c22a1/2009584027/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwOTYtamEtZ2ZwLW5kIn0=/ "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/protect-abortion-rights?source=jtk3096-ja-gfp-nd")**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9771ad/2ae112ef/6fe0ee01/357c22a1/2009584027/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwOTYtamEtZ2ZwLW5kIn0=/ "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/protect-abortion-rights?source=jtk3096-ja-gfp-nd")
---
The bills Republicans have been introducing this year run the gamut: Six-week abortion bans, before most women even know they're pregnant, became law in Ohio, Kentucky, Georgia and Mississippi already this year. The Alabama House passed a bill last week to ban ALL abortion with no exceptions for rape or incest.
And Texas legislators introduced an absurdly draconian bill to make abortion a crime _punishable with the death penalty_ for both women and their doctors.
**A woman's right to make her own personal health decisions is non-negotiable.** In the face of relentless attacks from the Trump administration and its allies in Congress, I have always stood up to protect women's access to safe and legal abortion, birth control and health care at Planned Parenthood.
I've vowed to overturn President Trump's domestic gag rule--which prevents doctors from giving their patients information about the full range of reproductive health care--on day one of my presidency.
And I'm proud to say that as president, I will protect our courts from anti-choice extremists.
**If you want a president who will fiercely defend reproductive rights, sign on to support my pledge to only nominate judges and Supreme Court justices who will commit to upholding _Roe_ and protect reproductive rights:**
**[https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/protect-abortion-rights](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9771ad/2ae112ef/6fe0ee01/357c22a1/2009584027/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwOTYtamEtZ2ZwLW5kIn0=/ "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/protect-abortion-rights?source=jtk3096-ja-gfp-nd")**
Thank you,

Kirsten

Peter, In Waller County, here in the Texas 10th, another tragic reminder of the work we must do to reform the criminal justice system. Sandra Bland, a community activist who committed herself to working for the Prairie View A&M student community, died in police custody after an illegal arrest. **[This video](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/6595894/60465960/-1856487081?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDI0NTUxYy0xOTcxLWU5MTEtYjQ5ZS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WiY5HcNlNz_PA2epxHc_BmkOAZQuoZdcTdfVLecLwFE=)** , released years after her death--after her family's civil case was settled, after criminal charges against the arresting officer were dismissed--shows how the officer lied to try to justify his actions.

As Democrats, we need to join with our brothers and sisters in rural communities like Waller County, to shine a light on injustice, and provide support and solidarity. As Martin Luther King Jr. said, “Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere. We are caught in an inescapable network of mutuality, tied in a single garment of destiny. Whatever affects one directly, affects all indirectly.” We join with the family of Sandra Bland in demanding that the criminal prosecution be re-opened. No wrongdoer should escape justice by lying and hiding evidence. #SayHerName In solidarity,
Mike Siegel

| | | | I'm standing up for meaningful action to tackle climate change. Will you stand with me? | | | [DEMAND ACTION](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa290/18d6a294/4a8d31ce/26d69a73/156368976/VEsE/ "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e190507ns")
---
The Department of Defense calls climate change one of the greatest threats to our national security, and they're right.
Rather than taking the lead to tackle a global issue and boosting a new economy, our president calls climate change a hoax - ignoring 97% of scientists and his administration's own security assessments.
Climate change deniers are the people that say we have to choose between protecting our environment and creating jobs. It's a false choice -- we can do both.
We absolutely have the ingenuity and imagination to tackle big problems but we can't make it happen with one political party denying the existence of the problem.
Climate change shouldn't be a partisan issue and ignoring the problem won't make it go away.
[**_Demand action to combat climate change. Add your name to mine._**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa290/18d6a294/4a8d31ce/26d69a73/156368976/VEsF/ "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e190507ns")
We're at a crossroads right now -- we can choose to lead a global effort to combat climate change while creating good-paying Tennessee jobs in the process, or we can get left behind.
[**_Sign my petition demanding our leaders take action on climate change._**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa290/18d6a294/4a8d31ce/26d69a73/156368976/VEsC/ "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e190507ns")
Thank you,
James

Important announcement about where we're at and where we're going. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mikegravel/state-of-the-campaign?e=85f7472d66)
---
|
---
| | |
# State of the Campaign
---
| Last week, we announced that we’re running to win. What does that mean exactly? Well, it means that we really want Nate Silver to write a feature about us. It also means that we’ve been so overwhelmed by the outpouring of support that we’ve decided to broaden our approach. Instead of just trying to make it to the debates through a fundraising goal, we’re going to ride the Gravelanche for as long as we can. We’re not just trying to make it to the debates — we’re building a movement.
---
| [J](https://mikegravel.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=571d51ae44&e=85f7472d66)[oin the movement with a $1.00 donation](https://mikegravel.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=7215a5e97e&e=85f7472d66)
---
| **Fundraising **
---
| We’re eight days away from May 15 and we haven’t hit 65,000 individual donations. We have, however, hit 65,000 phone calls made to the DNC to try and confirm this date. Unsurprisingly, we’ve been stonewalled at every turn. The centrists and neoliberals are so afraid of having Mike on the debate stage that they won’t even tell us the deadline. But, through perseverance and teenage ingenuity, we are now _reasonably sure*_ that the deadline is June 12. To date, we’ve pulled in a massive 30,000+ donations, achieving in ONE month what took some candidates half a year of cross-country campaigning and fancy $5,600-a-seat fundraisers to do. With another month, we have no doubt we’ll be beating Kirsten Gillibrand and the #Moultonmentum in fundraising as well as polling. We need 2,500 donations TODAY to kickstart our campaign and get us back on track to make the new June 12th deadline. Share our Instagram posts to your story, retweet our Tweets, get donate links wherever you can. We know we’re going to make the debate stage we just need your help:
---
| [A](https://mikegravel.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=fd6da93877&e=85f7472d66)[ll it takes is just a $1.00 donation today](https://mikegravel.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=cbc08301e6&e=85f7472d66)
---
| **Polling**
---
| Kirsten Gillibrand, Eric Swalwell, Jay Inslee, and Seth Moulton have spent millions of dollars on political consultants and PR firms between the four of them. It turns out you can’t buy popularity, though, because time and time again the neoliberals LOSE to our simple anti-war message in polling. In two recent Emerson polls, we beat all of these “serious” (read: centrist) candidates, but half of the pollsters still wouldn’t include us. That’s why we’ve spent the last few weeks hounding them and making sure we’re on every poll that will have us. We’re even polling well in rural areas like Texas and Iowa, with our major support centers in cities still largely untouched. We’ve already crushed the #Moultonmentum and beaten poor Tulsi, so we’re gunning for Peter B next.
---
|
---
This BEAUTIFUL portrait is brought to you by the genius mind of @eric_kelly (Twitter and IG). We have some truly incredible shots that we’re going to start getting out to the press—stay tuned!
| **Media**
---
| Catch Senator Gravel on The Humanist Report with Mike Figueredo today, May 7, at 6:30 EDT and on The Young Turks with Cenk Uygur, Thursday, May 9, at 8PM EDT.
---
| [W](https://mikegravel.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=404f1e769b&e=85f7472d66)[ant to see more of Mike? Get him to the debates for just $1.00](https://mikegravel.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=bbdf713d12&e=85f7472d66)
---
| **Press**
---
| Some recent clippings: _“Perhaps the only Democrat who has spoken somewhat plainly in this regard is the novelty candidate and former Sen. Mike Gravel, who has said that a national cult of militarism causes more violence than simple access to guns, and whose current campaign issues include such preposterous-that-they’re-preposterous positions as establishing a Department of Peace.”_
[The Outline - Where is the Left on Gun Control ](https://mikegravel.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=b466d4b98e&e=85f7472d66) _“Weeks after launching a 2020 campaign designed to fail, former Sen. Mike Gravel (D-Alaska) announced that he wants more than a one-off ticket to the Democratic primary debate stage: He wants to win. The long-shot octogenarian candidate — who also took a run at the White House in 2008 — is known for aiding the public release of the Pentagon Papers and for holding a hard anti-war stance. His stated goal has been to push the debate further to the left.”_
[Axios - Mike Gravel: Everything you need to kno](https://mikegravel.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=dcd0bdfcf3&e=85f7472d66)[w...](https://mikegravel.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=5be23df0b7&e=85f7472d66)
---
| **Merch**
---
| For those patiently awaiting the arrival of their “Pentagon Papers” gifts, rest assured, our merch team is working on the final details for production—we want to make sure they’re the highest quality papers you’ve used in your life, and that takes some special attention and care. We’ll keep you posted on the latest when we finalize details with our small-scale manufacturers. We’ve also heard your requests all over the internet: Our design and media team have begun talks with an in-house production specialist to get some t-shirts printed soon.

subject: First Lady Melania Trump celebrates 1 year of ‘Be Best’
body:
“One year ago today, I announced Be Best, an awareness campaign dedicated to the children of this country and all over the world.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cd9822edaa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 7, 2019
---
| | |
# **First Lady Melania Trump celebrates 1 year of ‘Be Best’**

**“One year ago today,** I announced Be Best, an awareness campaign dedicated to the children of this country and all over the world,” First Lady Melania Trump said today in the White House Rose Garden. “It continues to have one goal, which is to educate children and parents about the issues they face.”
**🎬****Highlights:**[One year of First Lady Melania Trump’s “Be Best”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=87faad93fe&e=3ee4985eea)
**Broken into 3 pillars** of protecting well-being, promoting online safety, and fighting opioid abuse among children and their families, “Be Best” is the First Lady’s signature White House initiative. In the past year, she has taken that message across both the United States and the world, including visits to 9 countries and a solo trip to Africa last fall.

**After a year’s worth** of hearing directly from children, parents, teachers, and professionals, the First Lady announced today that she’ll be expanding on some of these core principals to broaden the initiative’s reach even further. In the digital sphere, for example, Be Best will promote programs that encourage both online safety and digital citizenship in today’s technology-driven world.

**Today’s anniversary celebration** brought together participants with a mix of expert insight and deeply moving personal stories:
* Dr. Francis Collins, Director of the National Institutes of Health, explained the [importance of spiritual well-being](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7840112d05&e=3ee4985eea) for children today.

* Microsoft’s Toni Townes-Whitley talked about the decades-long effort to [protect children and teens online](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d799b6d4f&e=3ee4985eea).

* “America This Week” host Eric Bolling, who lost a son to accidental overdose, thanked the First Lady for [helping lift the stigma](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=974e655d3d&e=3ee4985eea) on opioids.

**“I am here** with one goal, which is to help children reach their full potential so they can grow up happy, healthy and contribute positively to society and the world,” the First Lady said. “If we listen to our kids, whether it’s their fears, interests, ideas, or concerns, we can provide them the support and tools they need to thrive.”

[Learn more about the First Lady’s signature initiative, Be Best.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ece3b19d9b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: Tiger Woods awarded the Presidential Medal of Freedom**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=378746ef22&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Last night,** President Donald J. Trump awarded our Nation’s highest civilian honor, the Presidential Medal of Freedom, to one of the greatest athletes in American sports.

**“Tiger Woods** is a global symbol of American excellence, devotion, and drive,” President Trump said during the ceremony. Indeed, Tiger Woods transformed the game of golf as he reached new levels of dominance—and inspired a generation of young Americans to take an interest in the sport.

**On Sunday, April 14** , the country tuned in yet again, this time as Woods captured his fifth Masters victory. After being hampered by a string of significant injuries, last month’s win represented his first major title in more than a decade and his 15th in total.

**Off the course,** Woods has been a devoted philanthropist. Junior golf programs across the country are supported by the TGR Foundation, and more than 165,000 students have been given a chance to pursue their dreams in STEM fields thanks to his Learning Lab.

**“We are inspired** by everything you have become and attained,” President Trump told Woods yesterday. “These qualities embody the American spirit of pushing boundaries, defying limits, and always striving for greatness.”

[Watch Tiger Woods deliver remarks from the Rose Garden](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f8531eca25&e=3ee4985eea).

**In photos:** [President Trump presents the Medal of Freedom to Woods](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c18bccc06&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
